title: Lobber Zombies
description: Adds the Lobber Zombie from Minecraft Earth.
body: Adds the Lobber Zombie mob from Minecraft Earth. These zombies spawn in biomes defined by the `#wich:spawns_lobber_zombies` tag [default `minecraft:plains` and `minecraft:sunflower_plains`]. Lobber Zombies attack far away players by throwing rotten flesh and melee attack nearby players.
